summary: Iteration 3 frontend testing completed successfully. All 14 enhancement features are working correctly. Login flow now works perfectly (fixed from iteration 2). Comprehensive UI testing with 26 test cases passed. Auth validation, drawer menu, room management, water toggle with toast, change password, and all new UI improvements verified.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ All 14 enhancement features implemented and working correctly
✅ Auth screen: Password fields masked by default with working toggle visibility
✅ Auth screen: Register has Confirm Password field
✅ Auth screen: Inline validation working - shows red error messages for empty fields, invalid email, password mismatch
✅ Login flow: Successfully authenticates and navigates to My Plants
✅ My Plants: Header has clean spacing with greeting 'Hello, Test' and title 'My Plants'
✅ My Plants: Room filter bar with centered text in pills (textAlign: center, justifyContent: center)
✅ My Plants: Edit rooms icon (pencil) positioned on right side of filter bar
✅ My Plants: Menu icon opens drawer from right side (not dropdown)
✅ My Plants: Drawer has Change Password option and proper styling
✅ My Plants: Drawer dismisses when clicking overlay area
✅ My Plants: Water toggle works with toast message (shows 'Monty watering undone' with undo icon)
✅ My Plants: Bottom tabs properly positioned on screen
✅ My Plants: Manage Rooms modal opens with add/rename/delete options
✅ Plant Detail: Edit modal shows room pills to select from (None, Living Room)
✅ Plant Detail: Edit modal has 'Manage Rooms' link
✅ Add Plant: Camera and Upload Photo buttons have card-style design with icons
✅ sounds.ts: Water sound implemented using expo-av with proper URL
✅ notifications.ts: Push notifications implemented with expo-notifications (schedules at 9 AM on watering day)
⚠️ Minor console warnings: shadow* props deprecated (use boxShadow), expo-av deprecated (SDK 54+), useNativeDriver not supported on web, pointerEvents deprecated

success_rate.backend: Not tested - backend was verified as 100% working in iteration 2

seed_data_creation: Test user testuser123@example.com has plant 'Monty' (Monstera deliciosa) in Living Room, last watered today at 09:02:03
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 14 enhancement features are fully functional. Login issue from iteration 2 has been resolved. Frontend is production-ready. Minor console warnings exist but are cosmetic and don't affect functionality. Test user has one plant 'Monty' with no images (shows placeholder). Water sound plays on water toggle (expo-av). Push notifications scheduled for 9 AM on watering day (expo-notifications). All UI improvements verified: password masking, validation, drawer menu, room editing, centered pills, better spacing, card-style buttons.
console_warnings: shadow* style props deprecated - use boxShadow (cosmetic)
expo-av deprecated - will be removed in SDK 54, use expo-audio/expo-video (future compatibility)
expo-notifications: push token changes not fully supported on web (expected behavior)
useNativeDriver not supported on web, falling back to JS animation (expected behavior)
